nodes.recentposition: Investment Banking Summer Analyst at J.P. Morgan in NYC, NY
nodes.bios: Hi! My name is Aimee Han and I initiated in my first year spring quarter here at UCI. In my free time I enjoy hiking at national parks and trying different coffees and teas. One fun thing I have done before is bungee jumping off a bridge in Washington! Ask me about traveling, food, and matcha at recruitment!
